This is the most inspiring AI story of the week. No lab, no sponsorship, just $2K in GPU rentals and pure determination. The open-source AI movement is built by people like this. One person with a mission can outpace entire teams.

Almost 95% of open-source projects make no money, yet people using those free tools often make a lot of money. Meanwhile, the ones who use them rarely give credit, say thanks, or offer sponsorship. Some even try to gatekeep.
